mentions.note: Data center networking play; one of only handful dominant in data center networking space alongside Cisco and Ciena.

Down 13.6% on beat but no guidance raise. Supply constraints (not weak demand) caused no raise; demand exceeds supply for 1–2 years. High-quality problem. CEO Jayshree Ullal will solve. Stock reprices as fears prove unfounded.
Networking equipment for data centers; critical infrastructure player.
Data-center connectivity play; Cramer very bullish on the data-center connectivity complex.
